programs.title: Xinjiang On the Road
programs.desc: Join an international group on an ice-snow adventure across northern Xinjiang, exploring stunning winter scenery, rich ethnic culture and warm hospitality from Urumqi to Altay.

programs.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programs.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programs.title: The Art of Harmony:  The Rite Society
programs.desc: “The Art of Harmony” is a documentary about Confucianism, produced by CGTN and Discovery Channel. It highlights the timeless nature of the sage’s philosophy and its global relevance today. Join us in exploring how the world might benefit from the pursuit of “The Art of Harmony”.

programs.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programs.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

programs.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 3
programs.desc: Join us in Nanjing’s bustling old quarter, where you can try on silk dresses worth their weight in gold, and see how traditional handicrafts have been given modern twists. We’ll feast on street snacks and local delicacies by the old Confucian Temple, before taking a pleasure cruise along Nanjing’s mother river to round off our exploration of this vibrant and historic city.

programs.title: Nyingchi Ep.1
programs.desc: Join Tianran He in Nyingchi, Xizang Autonomous Region. Fed by the Yarlung Zangbo River and abundant rainfall, this lush subtropical region is home to some of Xizan’g most unique scenery. From sacred mountains and ancient monasteries, to cruising along Nyingchi’s mother river, wandering alpine meadows and savoring stone pot chicken – a beloved local delicacy, Tianran uncovers the beauty of Nyingchi.
